messages.body: Hi Brooke
Please find the screenshot
Please find the screenshot
We are really sorry for the frustration but we can clearly see that our landing is now replaced with your website in the Google business profile

Its been months since ive used your services, and our company website will still not save on my google my business profile. You all have 24 hours to fix this issue and ensure this is not on your server related to anythin…
This is very frustrating.
I will @ the founders.
Hi Brooke,  I want to assure you that your account has been cancelled. If you have any further questions or need assistance with anything else, I'm here to help!
We should no longer have a zoca site address.
Hi. Can you cancel my account please?
Your call has been forwarded to voicemail the person you're trying to reach is not available at the tone. Please record your message

Hi, if you record your name and reason for calling, I'll see if this person is available. Hello, this is Shiv from Zoka. I'm the product lead, and I would like to speak with Brooke. Thanks, Shiv. Please stay on the line.
Thank you for calling Swella Braid Bar, where modern luxury meets protective styling. If you're ready to book your braid appointment and you already know the exact style you'd like, press 1 now.

Hi, i was informed that i would only be messaged by Suri Kripali moving forward.
Hello Brooke,  Hope you’re doing well :)  Just checking in to see how things are going at your end!
Please cancel my account. There has been a lack of communication and expectation setting. I no longer wish to move forward.
Hello Brooke,  I completely understand your frustration. Let me speak to my management and get back to you on this tomorrow. Thank you for your understanding :)
I just got an update from Roshan that it might take some time. He’s gonna text you on WhatsApp soon.
Correct. What else would i be referencing?
Hello Brooke,  Hope you’re doing well :)  You mentioned discovery agent, which had me confused.
